/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ppe_project_design_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ppe_project_design_tests.dir/tests/test_project_design_connection_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_project_design_tests.dir/src/modules/project_design/model/model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ppe_project_design_tests.dir/src/modules/project_design/model/connection_ops.cpp.o -o ppe_project_design_tests  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
